title: DeckTweaks
description: Control render distance, simulation distance, and master volume on the fly with simple keyboard shortcuts, no menus, no pause screen. Comes with a clean in-game toast notification for every change. Perfect for Stream Deck users.
body:
# DeckTweaks

**DeckTweaks** lets you control render distance, simulation distance, and master volume on the fly, directly from your keyboard or Stream Deck, without ever opening a menu.

Every change shows as a clean, minimal toast notification in the bottom-right corner of your screen, so you always know what's happening.

---

## Features

- **Render distance** — increase or decrease on the fly, chunks reload instantly
- **Simulation distance** — tweak how far the game simulates without restarting
- **Master volume** — adjust in 5% steps while staying in-game
- **Toast notifications** — subtle, styled HUD notification for every change, no chat spam
- **Stream Deck ready** — all shortcuts are simple two-key combos that map perfectly to macro buttons

---

## Keybinds

| Keybind | Action |
|---|---|
| `Ctrl` + `.` | Render distance +1 |
| `Ctrl` + `,` | Render distance -1 |
| `Ctrl` + `]` | Simulation distance +1 |
| `Ctrl` + `[` | Simulation distance -1 |
| `Ctrl` + `=` | Master volume +5% |
| `Ctrl` + `-` | Master volume -5% |

> **macOS users:** `Ctrl` means Control (⌃), not Command (⌘).

---

## Installation

1. Install [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) for Minecraft 1.21.11
2. Download and install [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
3. Drop `decktweaks.jar` into your `mods/` folder
4. Launch Minecraft and start tweaking

---

## Compatibility

- Minecraft 1.21.11
- Fabric only
- Client-side — works on any server
